anomalies.insight: Bangalore Pickup Points up 3,125% vs same Sunday last week (129 vs 4) — 11.9σ above range. This is a genuinely new Sunday Pickup Points channel in Bangalore — there was almost no volume last Sunday. This looks like a new Pickup Point location or a new partner that activated in the last 7 days. B2B/ops team to identify the source and formalise the partnership if it drove 125 incremental orders.

Upsell up 22% week-on-week (1,942 vs 1,586) and 2.2σ above range — contributing 34% of total weekly growth. Upsell growing faster than any other channel week-on-week on a Sunday-to-Sunday basis confirms the algorithm is increasingly effective on weekends. Review which SKU cross-sells are driving this and consider expanding Upsell triggers for Sunday traffic.

Pickup Points up 41% week-on-week (735 vs 521) — 3σ above range — contributing 20% of total weekly growth. The week-on-week jump confirms a structural shift toward Pickup Points, not just a Saturday→Sunday channel substitution. New Pickup Point locations or partners activated in the past week are the most likely driver. Ops team to document.

Delhi B2B up 86% week-on-week (299 vs 161) — 2.5σ above range — contributing 13% of weekly growth. Delhi B2B on Sundays has structurally doubled vs last Sunday. Check whether a new Delhi corporate client started placing orders in the last week, or if the Calcium Camp/Lipid Profile B2B activity (flagged in D-2 tab) is the driver.

Noida 09:00 slot up 307% week-on-week (57 vs 14) — 7.8σ above range. Last Sunday had almost no Noida 09:00 volume. A new B2B or corporate booking cycle for Sunday morning collections in Noida has emerged in the last 7 days. Ops team to ensure Sunday morning phlebo capacity in Noida is permanently increased.

anomalies.key: Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report
anomalies.insight: Good Health Gold down 16% week-on-week (634 vs 758) — 2.2σ below range — contributing 12% of weekly decline. Sunday Gold package demand is weaker this week than last Sunday. Check if last Sunday had a specific Gold promotion or featured placement that was not repeated this Sunday, and whether the Gold Sunday slot supply is consistent week-on-week.

Delhi Collection Centre up 129% week-on-week (80 vs 35) — 4.2σ above range. The weekly jump confirms a structural increase in Delhi walk-in demand, not just a Saturday reversion. A new Delhi Collection Centre location or expanded Sunday hours is the most likely driver. Ops team to document and ensure adequate Sunday staffing.

anomalies.key: Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report × 1mg-App/web
anomalies.insight: Good Health Gold via App/web down 18% week-on-week (425 vs 515) — 2.1σ below range. The weekly decline in Gold App/web on Sundays specifically suggests a change in Sunday App/web Gold placement or a promotion that ran last Sunday but not this one. Review Sunday homepage/category ranking for Gold.

anomalies.insight: 13:00 slot up 24% week-on-week (710 vs 574) — 1.2σ above range — contributing 13% of weekly growth. Midday Sunday ordering growing week-on-week, consistent with the 13:00 signal seen across multiple days this week. If a notification or slot expansion is driving this, it is now showing up as a sustained weekly trend.

Noida Pickup Points up 356% week-on-week (41 vs 9) — 4.7σ above range. Consistent with the Bangalore and national Pickup Points trends — new Pickup Point locations are driving Sunday walk-in demand across multiple cities. Noida ops team to confirm which new locations activated in the last 7 days.

Calcium Camp up 56% week-on-week (167 vs 107) — 2.3σ above range. Camp volume on Sundays is growing week-on-week, suggesting a recurring corporate/community health camp cycle. B2B team to map out which clients run Sunday camps and build a dedicated Sunday camp operations playbook.

Confirms Calcium Camp growth is entirely B2B-driven week-on-week. If this is a recurring Sunday B2B camp cycle, the ops team should pre-allocate Sunday phlebo capacity for camp orders to avoid last-minute capacity crunches.

Noida B2B up 307% week-on-week (122 vs 30) — 1.4σ above range. Noida B2B on Sundays has tripled vs last week. Combined with the Noida Pickup Points and 09:00 signals, Noida appears to have a new corporate client who places Sunday bulk orders. B2B team to identify and formalise.

10:00 slot up 16% week-on-week (886 vs 761) — 1σ above range — contributing 12% of weekly growth. Mid-morning Sunday bookings growing week-on-week. Check if new 10:00 slots were opened in key cities or if a recurring Sunday morning notification is driving this consistently.

Collection Centre channel up 13% week-on-week (574 vs 507) — 1.7σ above range — contributing 6% of weekly growth. Walk-in demand at Collection Centres is growing week-on-week on Sundays, consistent with reduced Sunday home-visit capacity. Ops team should review whether Sunday Collection Centre staffing levels match this growing weekly demand.
